subcodes.first_line: Jinab-i-Amin: The sums which you had previously forwarded have been acknowledged as received, and likewise the four hundred [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب امین مبالغی که از پیش ارسال نموده بودی اخبار بوصول شد و همچنین چهارصد
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to Christians, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
